article.p: A MetaOWL project follows a simple directory structure for organizing your application.

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
pre.code: src/ ├── pages/ # Page components (file-based routing) │ ├── index/ # → / │ ├── about/ # → /about │ └── docs/ # → /docs │ └── *.js ├── components/ # Reusable OWL components │ ├── Header/ │ └── Footer/ ├── layouts/ # Layout components │ └── doc/ # → 'doc' layout ├── css/ # Global CSS │ └── tailwind.css ├── assets/ # Static assets (images, fonts) ├── metaowl.js # App entry point └── index.html # HTML entry

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Pages are defined in src/pages/. Each folder represents a route:

ul.style: color: var(--doc-text-color); margin-bottom: 16px; list-style: disc; padding-left: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Components in src/components/ are auto-imported and available globally:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Layouts wrap your pages with common UI. Define layouts in src/layouts/:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
pre.code: // Use layout in page static layout = 'doc'
